where.if: AND (mem.member_nm LIKE '%'||#{kw}||'%' OR c.member_id LIKE '%'||#{kw}||'%' OR c.prod_id LIKE '%'||#{kw}||'%' OR prd.prod_nm LIKE '%'||#{kw}||'%')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdCart :: selectById */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , oi1.opt_nm AS opt_nm1 , oi2.opt_nm AS opt_nm2 FROM od_cart c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = c.member_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = c.prod_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi1 ON oi1.opt_item_id = c.opt_item_id_1 LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi2 ON oi2.opt_item_id = c.opt_item_id_2 WHERE c.cart_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(c.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdCart :: selectPageCount */ FROM od_cart c LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = c.member_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = c.prod_id
